docs.text: Parsing a word tparser.Parser.parse_word parse_word(word: str , no_display: bool = False) -> list [ tuple [ str , str , str ]] Get possible parsings of a given verb Returns: list [ tuple [ str , str , str ]] – [list of tuples] - possible parsings in format (prefixes, root, suffixes)
docs.title: Getting started

docs.text: parse_word(word: str , no_display: bool = False) -> list [ tuple [ str , str , str ]] Get possible parsings of a given verb Returns: list [ tuple [ str , str , str ]] – [list of tuples] - possible parsings in format (prefixes, root, suffixes)
docs.title: parse_word

docs.text: Parser Parser for verbs _load_json _load_json(filename: str ) Read json from a file in the package _normalize_word _normalize_word(word: str ) -> str Return a normalized form of the string _parse_ending _parse_ending(word: Verb , ending_list: list [ str ]) -> list [ Verb ] Try to parse given endings from the right of the word _parse_last_CV _parse_last_CV(word: Verb ) -> list [ Verb ] Try to parse a CV, CVV consonant from the end of the word _parse_last_CVC _parse_last_CVC(word: Verb ) -> list [ Verb ] Try to parse a CVC, CVVC consonant from the end of the word _parse_last_consonant _parse_last_consonant(word: Verb ) -> list [ Verb ] Try to parse rightmost consonant _parse_last_vowel _parse_last_vowel(word: Verb ) -> list [ Verb ] Try to parse rightmost vowel _parse_suffix _parse_suffix(word: Verb , suffix_list: list [ dict [ str , str ]]) -> list [ Verb ] Try to parse given suffixes from the right of the word _parse_suffixes _parse_suffixes(word: Verb ) -> list [ Verb ] Try to parse all possible suffixes (only one suffix though) _recover_stem _recover_stem(word: Verb ) -> list [ Verb ] Try and recover stem changes in the root from parsed verb
docs.title: Parser
